category_sources: source_facts.description says this is a command-line outline and bitmap font editor/converter.
display_name_sources: source_facts.homepage uses the official FontForge project site; source_facts.name is fontforge.
docs_sources: Official FontForge documentation is hosted under the FontForge project site.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has an official repository value, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies font editing/conversion; source_facts.executables lists fontforge and related CLI tools.
